languages.text: If Pasqal and the Medicae Mechadendrite target have a total of 10 Ferrum Sanctum stacks or more, the ability becomes available again.

traits.locale_text: Если у Паскаля и цели {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Медицинского мехадендрита{/g} суммарно 10 или более уровней {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g}, способность снова становится доступной.

Если у Паскаля и цели {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Медицинского мехадендрита{/g} суммарно 10 или более уровней {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}священного железа{/g}, способность снова становится доступной.

languages.text: Haben Pasqal und das Ziel von {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Medicae-Mechadendrit{/g} insgesamt 10 Stapel {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} oder mehr, ist die Fähigkeit erneut verfügbar.

traits.locale_text: Haben Pasqal und das Ziel von {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Medicae-Mechadendrit{/g} insgesamt 10 Stapel {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} oder mehr, ist die Fähigkeit erneut verfügbar.

languages.text: Si Pasqal y el objetivo de {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Mecadendrita medicae{/g} tienen un total de 10 acumulaciones de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} o más, la capacidad vuelve a estar disponible.
languages.original_text: If Pasqal and the target of {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Medicae Mechadendrite{/g} have a total of 10 stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} or more, the ability becomes available again.

traits.locale_text: Si Pasqal y el objetivo de {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Mecadendrita medicae{/g} tienen un total de 10 acumulaciones de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} o más, la capacidad vuelve a estar disponible.

languages.text: Pasqal ile {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Tıbbi Mekadentrit{/g} hedefinin toplamda 10 veya daha fazla {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}demir kutak{/g} birikimi varsa kabiliyet yeniden kullanılabilir hâle gelir.
languages.original_text: If Pasqal and the target of {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Medicae Mechadendrite{/g} have a total of 10 stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} or more, the ability becomes available again.

traits.locale_text: Pasqal ile {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Tıbbi Mekadentrit{/g} hedefinin toplamda 10 veya daha fazla {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}demir kutak{/g} birikimi varsa kabiliyet yeniden kullanılabilir hâle gelir.

languages.text: 如果帕斯卡与{g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}医疗机械触须{/g}的目标总共拥有10层及以上{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}，该能力将再次可用。
languages.original_text: If Pasqal and the target of {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Medicae Mechadendrite{/g} have a total of 10 stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} or more, the ability becomes available again.

traits.locale_text: 如果帕斯卡与{g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}医疗机械触须{/g}的目标总共拥有10层及以上{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}，该能力将再次可用。

languages.text: Si Pasqal et la cible de {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Mécadendrite de medicae{/g} ont un cumul total de 10 {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} ou plus, la capacité est de nouveau disponible.
languages.original_text: If Pasqal and the target of {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Medicae Mechadendrite{/g} have a total of 10 stacks of {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} or more, the ability becomes available again.

traits.locale_text: Si Pasqal et la cible de {g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}Mécadendrite de medicae{/g} ont un cumul total de 10 {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} ou plus, la capacité est de nouveau disponible.

languages.text: パスカルと{g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}メディカエ機械触手{/g}の対象が合計10スタック以上の{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}フェルム・サンクトゥム{/g}を持っている場合、このアビリティは再び使用可能になる。

traits.locale_text: パスカルと{g|f:de49d9600eeb4e9fb8a0adab3c46a260}メディカエ機械触手{/g}の対象が合計10スタック以上の{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}フェルム・サンクトゥム{/g}を持っている場合、このアビリティは再び使用可能になる。
